学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 75–80 range in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 70th (average), with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no clear signs of increased application interest; no history of enrollment gaps; Psychology A+ (top in China), Marxist Theory A, Education A-, Sports Science A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, which has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher-training/education majors shows a divergent and wait-and-see trend, overall stable; the total number of ordinary college entrance exam takers in Gansu in 2026 is about 218,700, a significant increase from 2025, with the number of Physics Category examinees rising from about 121,400 to about 147,600 (an increase of about 21.5%), significantly intensifying competition; South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and is a cross-province enrollment; the university's enrollment share in Gansu is about 0.5%–1%, a small-scale enrollment province, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the historical backward trend in rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (1 person), and the substantial increase in local Physics Category examinees (about 21.5%), rising competitive pressure is the dominant factor; the enrollment reduction has a decreasing effect on ranking numbers, but the increase in examinees far outweighs the reduction impact; it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 12400; predicted minimum ranking is about 12112, with a range of 11612–12612.
